title: nancy flexing w da piano game lmao
testing this shit
body: it's all fun and nice until one night you stare at the ceiling and let your mind overthink. that moment, all you can think about is how you're not worthy of anything. these lines start popping up in your head and they overwhelm you: "i was supposed to be special", "i was supposed to be the one", "where did i go wrong?", "what the hell am i even doing?", "i am not special, i am just like every other idiot"
